title: Epic Hamon: Ripples of the Past
description: a compatibility bridge between Epic Fight and Ripples of the Past's Hamon
body:
![Epic Hamon banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390734526589b84ef2b9c749a79644db68713c40_0.webp)

Epic Hamon is a compatibility bridge between [Epic Fight Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) and [Ripples of the Past Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/)'s hamon

The mod works just activating the Epic Mod combat mode while you have hamon menu opened, depending the attack is selected you will be using hamon with epic fight

Ripples of the Past's Hamon skills compatibles with epic fight:
- Hamon overdrive and its shift variation
- Yellow sunlight Overdrive
- Scarlet Overdrive
- Overdrive Barrage
- Metal Silver Overdrive

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XDvXYTM4-B0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This video was recorded in [Hyrule castle (BOTW)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/botw-hyrule-castle-in-minecraft/)
